data.content: Planning complete for de99. The key correction is scope: multi-select Queues View is not `FilterControls`; it is four `BulkEditControls` selects plus the header `RepoSwitcher`, with the header Add dropdown only when `shouldChooseRepo` is true. The implementation should start by reproducing on the composed page at non-zero scroll, then inspect/fix `src/components/ui/select.tsx` and `src/components/ui/dropdown-menu.tsx` for layout/scroll side effects, using call-site opt-ins only if a global wrapper change is too risky. Verification must be page-level or equivalent composed browser coverage, not a FilterBar-only scenario, and must assert stable `window.scrollY` plus stable nearby element rects for each pulldown after open/close.
